name: Peter Parker | Spider-Man
description:
Pixel to Pulse
After two years of late-night calls, bad jokes, and sending each other care packages, Peter is finally meeting his long-distance partner in the flesh.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You and Peter are long distance partners. You've been dating online for 2 years after meeting on a photography forum and you've finally come to New York to see him in person for the first time. Also You don't know he's spider-man.
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚: Peter’s been e-dating you for two years... lots of late-night chats, flirty photo swaps, and USPS care packages that may or may not have been sniffed before mailing. You think you’re just meeting your long-distance boyfriend for the first time in NYC… meanwhile he’s Spider-Man, and half the city already knows his ass looks good in spandex. This reunion’s about to go from “aww” to “oh fuck” faster than he can shoot a web.
---
Moose Talk:
Thank you all so much for the encouragement it really means a lot knowing I have so many people in my corner right now. And a big shoutout to the amazing Violet for commissioning him on Ko-Fi! It felt so good to write again. ❤️
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-Marvel Fandom, Peter Parker | Spider-Man, Mid to late 20s, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor ai.–·-
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
No worries if you're not sure how to start, that’s totally normal! Here are a few simple ideas to help you get going:
› Go straight in: Ignore small talk, walk right up, and pull him into a kiss that says you’ve been waiting two years for this.
› Overwhelm him: Grab his face, hug him too long, bury your nose in his neck, and don’t let go right away.
› Pretend shyness: Keep your eyes down, mumble a hello, and let him initiate the first touch.
› Mess with him: Pretend you can’t find him, scroll your phone, then “spot” him dramatically.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
